name: set_session
description: Sent by the browser right after connecting. Payload {session_id}. Remember this session_id and pass it as the session_id parameter on every tool call.

name: show_flights
description: Send this right after search_flights returns so the browser can render the flight cards. Payload: {offers: [{offer_id, airline, stops, total_price, currency, summary}]}.

name: show_booking
description: Send this after book_flight succeeds so the browser can show the confirmation. Payload: {record_locator, passenger, total_price, currency}.

name: show_hotels
description: Send right after search_hotels returns to render hotel cards. Payload {offers:[{offer_id,name,brand_name,rating,room_type,nightly_rate,total_price,currency,summary}]}.

name: show_hotel_booking
description: Send after book_hotel succeeds to show the confirmation. Payload {confirmation_number,guest,hotel_name,room_type,total_price,currency}.

name: show_cars
description: Send right after search_cars returns to render car cards. Payload {offers:[{offer_id,vendor_name,car_type,transmission,daily_rate,total_price,currency,summary}]}.

name: show_car_booking
description: Send after book_car succeeds to show the confirmation. Payload {confirmation_number,driver,vendor_name,car_type,total_price,currency}.
